languages.text: "Почти идентичный случай произошел на одном из миров, принадлежавшему Лорду Терры. Примечательно, что обвиняемый так же не явился держать ответ лично, а обвиняющей стороной выступал малый имперский культ, готовый свершить расправу. Вердикт был таков: сурово пресечь самосуд и беспорядки, казнив обоих участников дела".

"An almost identical incident took place on a world that belonged to one of the High Lords of Terra. Notably, the defendant also failed to show up to court in person, while the plaintiff was a minor Imperium cult seeking to engage in vigilantism. The verdict was to suppress the disturbance and the dispensation of mob justice harshly by having both parties to the case executed."
languages.original_text: "Почти идентичный случай произошел на одном из миров, принадлежавшему Лорду Терры. Примечательно, что обвиняемый так же не явился держать ответ лично, а обвиняющей стороной выступал малый имперский культ, готовый свершить расправу. Вердикт был таков: сурово пресечь самосуд и беспорядки, казнив обоих участников дела".

traits.locale_text: "An almost identical incident took place on a world that belonged to the Lord of Terra. Notably, the defendant also failed to show up to court in person, while the plaintiff was a minor Imperium cult seeking to engage in vigilantism. The lord's verdict was to take justice in his own hands and have both parties to the case executed."

"An almost identical incident took place on a world that belonged to the Lord of Terra. The lord's verdict was to take justice in his own hands and have both parties to the case executed."

Notably, the defendant also failed to show up to court in person, while the plaintiff was a minor Imperium cult seeking to engage in vigilantism. The lord's verdict was to take justice in his own hands and have both parties to the case executed."

"The torture and questioning were not conducted by Arbitrators, and thus, the information obtained from them is unreliable. If you wish to have the head Astropath executed so as to remove the threat to the dynasty, that is your right, but I ask you to spare the rest of the Choir. Those people are crucial for maintaining communication between worlds."

"An almost identical incident took place on a world that belonged to one of the High Lords of Terra. Notably, the defendant also failed to show up to court in person, while the plaintiff was a minor Imperium cult seeking to engage in vigilantism. The verdict was to suppress the disturbance and the dispensation of mob justice harshly by having both parties to the case executed."

The verdict was to suppress the disturbance and the dispensation of mob justice harshly by having both parties to the case executed."

"An almost identical incident took place on a world that belonged to the Lord of Terra. Notably, the defendant also failed to show up to court in person, while the plaintiff was a minor Imperium cult seeking to engage in vigilantism. The lord's verdict was to take justice in his own hands and have both parties to the case executed."

languages.text: "Ein nahezu identischer Vorfall ereignete sich auf einer Welt, die dem Lord von Terra gehörte. Auch dort erschien der Angeklagte nicht persönlich vor Gericht, während der Kläger ein unbedeutender Kult des Imperiums war, der sich in Selbstjustiz übte. Der Lord nahm das Gesetz deshalb selbst in die Hand und lies beide Parteien hinrichten."
languages.original_text: "An almost identical incident took place on a world that belonged to the Lord of Terra. Notably, the defendant also failed to show up to court in person, while the plaintiff was a minor Imperium cult seeking to engage in vigilantism. The lord's verdict was to take justice in his own hands and have both parties to the case executed."

languages.text: « Un incident quasi identique s'est produit sur un monde qui appartenait à l'un des Hauts Seigneurs de Terra. L'accusé n'a pas non plus assisté au procès en personne, tandis que le plaignant était une secte mineure de l'Imperium qui cherchait à faire appliquer sa propre forme de justice. Le tribunal a fermement réprimé les troubles et les lynchages en faisant exécuter les deux parties impliquées dans l'affaire. »
languages.original_text: "An almost identical incident took place on a world that belonged to one of the High Lords of Terra. Notably, the defendant also failed to show up to court in person, while the plaintiff was a minor Imperium cult seeking to engage in vigilantism. The verdict was to suppress the disturbance and the dispensation of mob justice harshly by having both parties to the case executed."

traits.locale_text: « Un incident quasi identique s'est produit sur un monde qui appartenait à l'un des Hauts Seigneurs de Terra. L'accusé n'a pas non plus assisté au procès en personne, tandis que le plaignant était une secte mineure de l'Imperium qui cherchait à faire appliquer sa propre forme de justice. Le tribunal a fermement réprimé les troubles et les lynchages en faisant exécuter les deux parties impliquées dans l'affaire. »

languages.text: “之前，在某个由泰拉至高领主管辖的世界里，曾发生过几乎完全相同的事情。值得注意的是，当时的原告也是个热衷于维护治安的小型帝国教派，而被告也没有亲自出庭。那位领主的判决是将涉及纠纷的双方统统处决，通过这种严厉的手段制止暴民擅自行使正义。”
languages.original_text: "An almost identical incident took place on a world that belonged to one of the High Lords of Terra. Notably, the defendant also failed to show up to court in person, while the plaintiff was a minor Imperium cult seeking to engage in vigilantism. The verdict was to suppress the disturbance and the dispensation of mob justice harshly by having both parties to the case executed."

traits.locale_text: “之前，在某个由泰拉至高领主管辖的世界里，曾发生过几乎完全相同的事情。值得注意的是，当时的原告也是个热衷于维护治安的小型帝国教派，而被告也没有亲自出庭。那位领主的判决是将涉及纠纷的双方统统处决，通过这种严厉的手段制止暴民擅自行使正义。”
“之前，在某个由泰拉领主管辖的世界里，曾发生过几乎完全相同的事情。值得注意的是，当时的原告也是个热衷于维护治安的小型帝国教派，而被告也没有亲自出庭。那位领主的判决是亲自主持正义，将涉及纠纷的双方统统处决了。”
“之前，在某个由泰拉领主管辖的世界里，曾发生过几乎完全相同的事情。值得注意的是，当时的原告也是个热衷于维护治安的小型帝国教派，而被告也没有亲自出庭。那位领主的判决是亲自主持正义，将涉及纠纷的双方统统处决了。”

languages.text: «Un incidente similar tuvo lugar en un planeta perteneciente a uno de los Altos Señores de Terra. En este caso, el acusado tampoco se presentó ante el tribunal y la acusación venía de un culto menor del Imperium que buscaba hacer de justicieros. En ese caso, el veredicto consistió en sofocar el disturbio y castigar duramente la justicia popular mediante la ejecución de ambas partes del caso».
languages.original_text: "An almost identical incident took place on a world that belonged to one of the High Lords of Terra. Notably, the defendant also failed to show up to court in person, while the plaintiff was a minor Imperium cult seeking to engage in vigilantism. The verdict was to suppress the disturbance and the dispensation of mob justice harshly by having both parties to the case executed."

traits.locale_text: «Un incidente similar tuvo lugar en un planeta perteneciente a uno de los Altos Señores de Terra. En este caso, el acusado tampoco se presentó ante el tribunal y la acusación venía de un culto menor del Imperium que buscaba hacer de justicieros. En ese caso, el veredicto consistió en sofocar el disturbio y castigar duramente la justicia popular mediante la ejecución de ambas partes del caso».

«Un incidente similar tuvo lugar en un planeta perteneciente a uno de los Señores de Terra. En este caso, el acusado tampoco se presentó ante el tribunal y la acusación venía de un culto menor del Imperium que buscaba hacer de justicieros. En ese caso, el Señor se tomó la justicia por su mano e hizo ejecutar a ambas partes del caso».

«Un incidente similar tuvo lugar en un planeta perteneciente a uno de los Señores de Terra. En este caso, el acusado tampoco se presentó ante el tribunal y la acusación venía de un culto menor del Imperium que buscaba hacer de justicieros. En ese caso, el Señor se tomó la justicia por su mano e hizo ejecutar a ambas partes del caso».

languages.text: 「地球の至高卿の一人が所有する惑星で、ほぼ同じ事件が起きました。特筆すべきは、被告が法廷に姿を現さなかったことです。一方、原告は自警活動に従事しようとする帝国の小さな教団でした。判決は、騒動を徹底して鎮圧し、群衆によって勝手に裁きが下されたことへの厳罰として、両当事者を処刑するというものでした」
languages.original_text: "An almost identical incident took place on a world that belonged to one of the High Lords of Terra. Notably, the defendant also failed to show up to court in person, while the plaintiff was a minor Imperium cult seeking to engage in vigilantism. The verdict was to suppress the disturbance and the dispensation of mob justice harshly by having both parties to the case executed."

traits.locale_text: 「地球の至高卿の一人が所有する惑星で、ほぼ同じ事件が起きました。特筆すべきは、被告が法廷に姿を現さなかったことです。一方、原告は自警活動に従事しようとする帝国の小さな教団でした。判決は、騒動を徹底して鎮圧し、群衆によって勝手に裁きが下されたことへの厳罰として、両当事者を処刑するというものでした」
「地球の至高卿の所有する惑星で、ほぼ同じ事件が起きました。特筆すべきは、被告が法廷に姿を現さなかったことです。一方、原告は自警活動に従事しようとする帝国の小さな教団でした。至高卿の判決は、自らの手で正義を下し、両当事者を処刑させるというものでした」
「地球の至高卿の所有する惑星で、ほぼ同じ事件が起きました。特筆すべきは、被告が法廷に姿を現さなかったことです。一方、原告は自警活動に従事しようとする帝国の小さな教団でした。至高卿の判決は、自らの手で正義を下し、両当事者を処刑させるというものでした」

languages.text: "Neredeyse aynı hadise, Terra'nın Yüce Lordları'na ait bir dünyada yaşanmıştı. Bilhassa davalı, mahkemeye bizzat teşrif etmemişti, davacı ise adaleti kanunsuz bir şekilde kendi sağlamaya çalışan küçük bir İmparatorluk tarikatından ibaretti. Karar, hem davalı hem de davacı tarafların idam edilmesiyle kargaşanın bastırılması ve güruh adaletinin sert bir şekilde dağıtılması yönünde olmuştu."
languages.original_text: "An almost identical incident took place on a world that belonged to one of the High Lords of Terra. Notably, the defendant also failed to show up to court in person, while the plaintiff was a minor Imperium cult seeking to engage in vigilantism. The verdict was to suppress the disturbance and the dispensation of mob justice harshly by having both parties to the case executed."

traits.locale_text: "Neredeyse aynı hadise, Terra'nın Yüce Lordları'na ait bir dünyada yaşanmıştı. Bilhassa davalı, mahkemeye bizzat teşrif etmemişti, davacı ise adaleti kanunsuz bir şekilde kendi sağlamaya çalışan küçük bir İmparatorluk tarikatından ibaretti. Karar, hem davalı hem de davacı tarafların idam edilmesiyle kargaşanın bastırılması ve güruh adaletinin sert bir şekilde dağıtılması yönünde olmuştu."

"Neredeyse aynı hadise, Terra Lordu'na ait bir dünyada yaşanmıştı. Bilhassa davalı, mahkemeye bizzat teşrif etmemişti, davacı ise adaleti kanunsuz bir şekilde kendi sağlamaya çalışan küçük bir İmparatorluk tarikatından ibaretti. Lordun nihai hükmü, adaleti kendi ellerine alıp davanın her iki tarafını da idam ettirmek olmuştu."

"Neredeyse aynı hadise, Terra Lordu'na ait bir dünyada yaşanmıştı. Bilhassa davalı, mahkemeye bizzat teşrif etmemişti, davacı ise adaleti kanunsuz bir şekilde kendi sağlamaya çalışan küçük bir İmparatorluk tarikatından ibaretti.
